title: Simply PVP
description: This mod adds weapons and utilities for pvp
body:
[![kinetic hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3e5234712d32562be999b307b425ca6286f4b8e_0.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1433)
This mod adds various weapons and utilities, the list may seemm incomplete because this is a WIP.

**Halberd:**
- Same base stats as a netherite sword
- Special ability: a swing attack that damages the surrouding entities

**Undead Spear:**
- Same base stats as a diamond sword
- Special ability: summons, 2 creepers, 2 skeletons and 2 zombies with a full diamond set on your enemies

**Celestial Blade:**
- Same base stats as a diamond sword
- Special ability: casts a sonic beam on your target dealing 3 hearts of damage, even with full netherite and prot IV

**Warhammer:**
- Same base stats as a diamond sword
- Special ability: causes a shockwave that launches players into the air
